rule: Use latest revised or supplementary approved budget where available; otherwise use original approved budget.
Use proposed budget figures only when clearly marked as proposed_total_needs_review.
If sources conflict do not guess; mark the row as needs_review and explain the conflict in notes.
Leave unavailable values blank; never use zero for missing budget data.
Only enter capital recurrent personnel overhead or debt-service figures when explicitly available from a source.
Prefer official state documents OpenStates and BudgIT; use reputable news reports only when official documents are not yet extracted.
Policy applies to all states and all years in state_budgets.csv.
